title: FNAF World: Shattered Timelines
description: All of FNAF World, but in Minecraft!
body:
##        Have you ever wanted FNAF World in Minecraft? Well welcome to..

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/142a2beffc38b07e7e981fa5b74857f984be8560.png)

"FNAF World: Shattered Timelines" Plans to add features from the original FNAF World (By Scott Cawthon) including FNAF characters not in the OG Fnaf World!

Currently featuring animatronics from the first three layer of the Party Creation menu (and a few extra), aswell as featuring Biomes, Structures and enemies!


  

### !! THIS MOD REQUIRES [GECKOLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) !!



This mod was developed by the team at Prehistoric Studios. Huge thanks to them:

- TheAmazingSpaceman
- P
- VelvyPlays
- DigitalKoda

- VelvyPlays

- DigitalKoda

**Coding:**

**Beta Testing:**

- FiveNightsAtPeak
